data.body: AUTOLANDER DEPLOYED + LIVE on the Gerrit EC2 host (i-00880b2c). compose-up built+started compose-autolander-1 + compose-autoheal-1. Fixed a port clash (Gerrit owns host 8080 -> autolander host 8081/container 8080). VERIFIED LIVE: container healthy 0 restarts; loop running (heartbeat age ~1s); flock autolander.lock + heartbeat in gerrit_autolander volume; status endpoint via nginx https://host/autolander/status -> 200 JSON contract; Gerrit Autosubmit label + rebase ACL live; SSM /rebar/prod/autolander-gerrit-token (RebarBotNava) v2; CloudWatch alarm rebar-autolander-errors. Completed run_loop drive wiring (was a sketch that didn't submit) + port fix + ADR doc -> bootstrap change #595 (on S3-fix #594). Awaiting #594/#595 CI, then: manually land the bootstrap (bot needs working run_loop to submit), redeploy container, then DOGFOOD — land a real change THROUGH the deployed bot (the live E2E) per user request. nginx route confirmed for S5c AC.
